facebook.caption:
Tourists walk straight past this place. Locals stop here first.

Tram Tram's Banh Mi on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of spot that doesn't need a sign-out front. 4.5 stars across 501 reviews says everything. Crispy bread, packed fillings, fast service. Classic Phu Quoc street-food energy without the tourist markup.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the line move at Tram Tram's Banh Mi. Locals order fast, bread comes out crispy, and nobody's paying resort prices. 4.5 stars. 501 reviews. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Now you know.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
